title: Black Light
overview: After a car accident leaves one man dead and another in a coma, it's believed that the dead man was at fault. Guilt-ridden, his wife, Hee-ju, struggles to move forward. She ends up learning that the victim had previously tried to kill himself. Suspecting the accident may have been on purpose, she begins an investigation.

trailers.title: BLACK LIGHT Trailer | PÖFF 2020
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
